descriptionShort: Tony Bobbitt scored overtime goal as Richmond Sockeyes defeated Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in Centennial Cup playoff game.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes beat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime during a Centennial Cup western final playoff game on April 23, 1987. Tony Bobbitt scored the overtime winner at 1:04. The victory gave Richmond a 2-1 series lead. Tomlinson, Claringbull, and Clarke also scored for Richmond, while McDougall (2) and Chamberlin scored for Humboldt.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Win Overtime Thriller Over Broncos
